description_long: This clock tower features a tall, rectangular wooden structure with a prominent base and a decorative, multi-tiered roof adorned with finials. The front face displays a large, arched clock with a white dial, black Arabic numerals, and ornate clock hands, set within a gold-trimmed frame. The wood is dark and polished, with subtle paneling and gold accent lines that enhance its stately appearance. The sides and rear are plain, lacking windows or additional ornamentation, emphasizing the verticality and solidity of the tower. The roof is gabled with a central peak and decorative spires, giving it a traditional, almost baroque character. This object would serve as a striking focal point in a public square or park, evoking a sense of historical grandeur.
description: A tall, dark wooden clock tower with a decorative gabled roof, gold trim, and a large arched clock face with Arabic numerals and ornate hands.
description_view_0: Front view showing the ornate clock face, gold trim, and decorative roof details.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the tower's depth, plain wooden panels, and the profile of the gabled roof.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the unadorned back panel and the full height of the structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, highlighting the tower's rectangular profile and roof outline.
attribute_clock_face_design: The clock face is arched and circular, with a white background, black Arabic numerals, and two ornate black hands. It is framed with gold trim and features subtle decorative motifs above the numerals. The design is traditional and elegant, with clear, easy-to-read markings.
